alibi-prompt: Who's lying? Tap the suspect whose alibi is contradicted.
archive-coming-soon: Archive coming in Phase 1: First Light
archive-description: Browse past puzzles. History is classified until it isn't.
benefit-badge: Participation earns a unique daily badge on your profile
benefit-cursor: The cursor becomes a baseball bat
benefit-puzzle: An exclusive puzzle appears (no archive, no replays)
benefit-theme: The entire UI transforms with the Sahur theme
benefit-xp: All XP earned is multiplied by {{multiplier}}x
chainlink-prompt: Build the chain! Reorder the middle words to connect {{start}} to {{end}}.
coalition-dashboard-subtitle: Your standing across the RMH ecosystem
drag-to-reorder: Drag items to reorder, or tap two items to swap
features-not-released: Features are not released. They are disclosed.
hall-of-incidents-desc: Every failure is content. Every outage is an event. This is the Hall of Incidents.
impostor-prompt: Which word has the wrong definition?
no-intelligence: No intelligence available at your clearance level.
no-submissions: No submissions yet today. Be the first.
not-active-desc: Sahur Mode activates between 3:00–4:00 AM in your local timezone. Triple XP. Exclusive puzzles. Bat cursor. TUNG TUNG TUNG.
puzzles-tagline: One thing. Maximum intensity. No second chances.
recruit-description: You don't sign up for this. You're recruited. Generate personalized invite links for targets whose skills would strengthen the coalition.
recruit-step-1: 1. Generate a personalized invite link with a custom message
recruit-step-2: 2. Share the link with your target recruit
recruit-step-3: 3. When they join, you earn 50 XP per signup
recruit-step-4: 4. If they convert to a paid tier, you earn 200 XP
recruit-step-5: 5. Links expire after 30 days or max uses
safehouse-subtitle: Classified intelligence. Raw development. Unfiltered process.
sahur-challenge-desc: The exclusive 3 AM puzzle is available now. Complete it before the window closes. Miss it and it's gone. No archive. No second chance.
temporal-monopoly: TEMPORAL MONOPOLY — THIS CONTENT SELF-DESTRUCTS AT 4:00 AM
upgrade-tier: Upgrade your tier to access classified content.
